name: I hurt my neck at work today in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?
description: Report to supervisor now, see approved doctor, document details. Utah requires notice within 180 days.[7]

mainEntity.name: I hurt my neck at work today in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to supervisor now, see approved doctor, document details. Utah requires notice within 180 days.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report the injury to your supervisor or HR immediately, seek medical attention from an approved provider, and document everything including witnesses and photos.[1][7] In Utah workers' comp cases, prompt reporting within 180 days is required, and delays can jeopardize claims.[7] Key factors: (1) Get treated at an employer-authorized doctor to ensure coverage; (2) Avoid signing any statements without advice; (3) Note symptoms even if minor, as neck injuries like whiplash can worsen.[1] File a formal claim with the Utah Labor Commission promptly; consider consulting a workers' comp attorney if unsure. Protecting your rights starts with these steps.
